name: USS Falcon (ASR 2)
events: 5 Jun 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted exercises off New London, Connecticut with the submarine rescue vessel USS Falcon (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Hunter, USN). (1)
10 Jan 1945 HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) conducted gunnery exercises off New London, Connecticut, U.S.A on a target that was being towed by USS Falcon (Lt. J.W. Thompson, USN). (2)
